untranslatable_reason: Signal requires moving average of 50-minute highs and 50-minute lows as separate indicators, which are not in the allowed indicator list. Available MAs are based on close prices (sma_50, ema_50, etc.), not high/low-specific moving averages. Additionally, moving_average_period parameter is marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] and moving_average_type is AUTHOR_SILENT, indicating insufficient specification.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses sma_50 as a proxy for the moving average reference, with buy stops on high crosses above MA and sell stops on low crosses below MA. However, this does not accurately capture the original intent of separate MAs of highs vs. lows. A custom indicator would be needed to implement this signal correctly.
